description: Specify the operating mode for the unstructured mesher.

keywords.name: mixed
keywords.description: Use triangles and quadrilaterals to create an unstructured mesh. In this mode, the mesher creates a quad-dominant (by area) mesh. In certain cases it may be able to create a purely quadrilateral mesh.

keywords.name: quad
keywords.description: Use quadrilaterals only to create an unstructured mesh. Under certain conditions, the mesher may fail to create purely quadrilateral mesh (e.g., an odd number of zones per block perimeter). An error will be displayed in this case.
